summary: Comparative-matrix deliverable fixture validating output-mode composition for KR/JP probability disclosure comparison.

issue_map.issue: Probability disclosure regime comparison: KR vs JP
issue_map.answer: KR imposes statutory disclosure under Art. 33-2; JP relies on industry self-regulation plus consumer-protection enforcement.

key_findings: KR statutory regime under [src_001] differs in scope and sanction from JP self-regulatory framework under [src_002].

sources.title: Korean Game Industry Promotion Act probability disclosure provisions
Japan CESA Self-Regulation Probability Display Guidelines

claim_checks.claim: KR statutory regime differs in scope and sanction from JP self-regulatory framework.
claim_checks.limitation: JP self-regulatory enforcement track record requires further verification.
